comment: Physical attack damage formulas and to-hit modifiers. All physical attacks use piloting skill, not gunnery.
to_hit_mods_flag: All to-hit modifiers below are extrapolated and likely incorrect — flag for full rules review

punch.notes: Each arm punches independently. Cannot punch if carrying a club or using arms for walking (quads).

kick.notes: Leg kicks. Standard physical attack for bipeds.

push.notes: Moves target 1 hex. May cause fall damage or push out of engagement. No direct damage.

club.notes: Uses a blown-off limb as improvised club. Picked up during movement phase. Precludes DFA/charge.

charge.notes: Distance traveled = hexes moved before impact. Both attacker and target take damage. Target is pushed. Attacker cannot fire weapons during charge.

dfa.notes: Death From Above. Jump jets required. Attacker lands in target hex. Both take damage. Attacker falls after DFA. Target is pushed.
